docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JORDAN, JODI AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-16-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-17-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-01-2011

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-27-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-16-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-19-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
